property.name: content
property.description: Additional Quarkus logging categories for Polaris. Use quoted category names when they contain dots.
property.value:
# Polaris logging defaults (applied via /etc/polaris/conf/logging.properties).
# Strip OTEL trace-context brackets, empty MDC fields, and thread name from log lines. # Default Quarkus+OTEL format includes [traceId,spanId] [,,,] (thread) which is noisy. quarkus.log.console.format=%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss,SSS} %-5p [%c{3.}] %s%e%n quarkus.log.file.format=%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss,SSS} %-5p [%c{3.}] %s%e%n
# Keep these Ranger-related categories at INFO for production baselines. # Admins can raise specific categories to DEBUG/TRACE when troubleshooting. quarkus.log.category."org.apache.polaris.service.config".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.polaris.extension.auth.ranger".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.plugin".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.plugin.service".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.plugin.util".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.plugin.util.PolicyRefresher".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.admin.client".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.admin.client.RangerAdminRESTClient".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.audit".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.audit.destination".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.audit.provider".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.audit.provider.hdfs".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.audit.utils".level=INFO quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.audit.queue".level=INFO
# Example troubleshooting overrides (uncomment temporarily): # quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.audit.provider.hdfs".level=DEBUG # quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.audit.destination".level=DEBUG # quarkus.log.category."org.apache.ranger.plugin.util.PolicyRefresher".level=DEBUG
